name: n8n Workflow Automation
description: Deploy and integrate n8n for workflow automation. Create automations that trigger on webhooks, schedule with cron, and connect your app to Slack, email, databases, and 400+ other services. Self-hosted for data privacy.

steps.description: Create production n8n compose with PostgreSQL backend, SMTP config, and webhook URL
Create webhook endpoint that n8n can trigger to start workflows from your app events
Create triggerWorkflow(workflowId, data) function using n8n REST API for app-initiated automations
